FOLDER.NAME: stg_shared
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: ETL Staging Shared Folder Primary: Vikram Chauhan Secondary: Veretta Schnackenberg

FOLDER.NAME: bl_shared
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: Blackline Shared Folder Primary: Vikram Chauhan Secondary: Veretta Schnackenberg

TARGET.DESCRIPTION: This flat file is used for Blackline Journal.
TARGET.NAME: FF_BL_ZJ_JOURNALS

FOLDER.NAME: bl_project
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: Blackline Project Folder Primary: Vikram Chauhan Secondary: Veretta Schnackenberg

MAPPING.DESCRIPTION: Data loads from JDE to either Blackline or Staging table based on GLPOST column
MAPPING.NAME: m_BL_FF_ZJ_JOURNALS_STG

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Checking for the null values for fields and replacing double quotes.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: exp_replace_R

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: This Filter is used to filter the foreign currencies having GLLT column value as AA.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: flt_condition_Foreign_currency_R

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: This expression is used to flag the foreign currencies with GLLT column value as 'AA'.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: exp_Flag_R

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: This expression is used to flag the foreign currencies with GLLT column value as 'AA'.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: exp_Flag_NR

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: This Filter is used to filter the foreign currencies having GLLT column value as AA.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: flt_condition_Foreign_currency_NR

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Lookup on F0092 table to get ULAN8 column based on ULUSER
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: lkp_F0092_NR

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Lookup on F01151 table to get EAETP and EAEMAL column based on EAAN8
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: lkp_F01151_NR

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Lookup on F0092 table to get ULAN8 column based on ULUSER.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: lkp_F0092_R

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Lookup on F01151 table to get EAETP and EAEMAL column based on EAAN8
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: lkp_F01151_R

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Based on the GLPOST column value data is loaded into flatfile and staging table
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: rtr_GLPOST_NR

GROUP.DESCRIPTION: Path for the data when none of the group conditions are satisfied.
GROUP.NAME: DEFAULT1

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Based on the GLPOST column value data is loaded into flatfile and staging table
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: rtr_GLPOST_R

GROUP.DESCRIPTION: Path for the data when none of the group conditions are satisfied.
GROUP.NAME: DEFAULT1

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Sort the records based on the below columns GLKCO,GLDCT,GLDOC,GLJELN and GLLT
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: srt_R

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Lookup on staging table based on F0911_GLDCT, F0911_GLDOC, F0911_GLKCO, F0911_GLJELN, F0911_GLLT column.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: lkp_S_ZJ_JOURNALS_R

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: F0911_GLDCT = GLDCT AND F0911_GLDOC = GLDOC AND F0911_GLKCO = GLKCO AND F0911_GLLT = GLLT AND F0911_GLJELN = GLJELN

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Define the Flag as 'N' if the data present at Staging table S_ZJ_JOURNALS
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: exp_Flag_STG_R

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(ISNULL(lkp_F0911_GLDCT) AND ISNULL(lkp_F0911_GLDOC) AND ISNULL(lkp_F0911_GLKCO) AND ISNULL(lkp_F0911_GLLT) AND ISNULL(lkp_F0911_GLJELN),'Y','N')
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: out_Flag

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Filter the records if it present in Staging table S_ZJ_JOURNALS
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: flt_STG_R

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Lookup on staging table based on F0911_GLDCT, F0911_GLDOC, F0911_GLKCO, F0911_GLJELN, F0911_GLLT column.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: lkp_S_ZJ_JOURNALS_NR

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: F0911_GLDCT = GLDCT AND F0911_GLDOC = GLDOC AND F0911_GLKCO = GLKCO AND F0911_GLLT = GLLT AND F0911_GLJELN = GLJELN

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Define the Flag as 'N' if the data present at Staging table S_ZJ_JOURNALS
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: exp_Flag_STG_NR

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(ISNULL(lkp_F0911_GLDCT) AND ISNULL(lkp_F0911_GLDOC) AND ISNULL(lkp_F0911_GLKCO) AND ISNULL(lkp_F0911_GLLT) AND ISNULL(lkp_F0911_GLJELN),'Y','N')
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: out_Flag

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Filter the records if it present in Staging table S_ZJ_JOURNALS
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: flt_STG_NR

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Expression for trim logic for Fields.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: exp_TRIM_R

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Filter condition for the data equal to R.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: flt_condition_R

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Filter condition for the data not equal to R.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: flt_condition_NR

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Expression for trim logic for fields..
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: exp_TRIM_NR

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Perform aggegation based on GLDGJ column to pick only reversed records having min GLDGJ
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: agg_GLDGJ_R

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Checking for the null values for fields and replacing double quotes.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: exp_replace_NR

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Expression for data flow.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: exp_PASS_THROUGH_NR

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: SQ performing join of F0011_F0911_F0901, filtering records based on condition.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: sq_to_F0011_F0911_F0901_NR

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: SQ performing join of F0011_F0911_F0901, filtering records based on condition
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: sq_to_F0011_F0911_F0901_R

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Expression for data flow.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: exp_PASS_THROUGH_R

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Checking for the null values for fields and replacing double quotes.
INSTANCE.NAME: exp_replace_R

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: This Filter is used to filter the foreign currencies having GLLT column value as AA.
INSTANCE.NAME: flt_condition_Foreign_currency_R

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: This expression is used to flag the foreign currencies with GLLT column value as 'AA'.
INSTANCE.NAME: exp_Flag_R

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: This expression is used to flag the foreign currencies with GLLT column value as 'AA'.
INSTANCE.NAME: exp_Flag_NR

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: This Filter is used to filter the foreign currencies having GLLT column value as AA.
INSTANCE.NAME: flt_condition_Foreign_currency_NR

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Lookup on F0092 table to get ULAN8 column based on ULUSER
INSTANCE.NAME: lkp_F0092_NR

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Lookup on F01151 table to get EAETP and EAEMAL column based on EAAN8
INSTANCE.NAME: lkp_F01151_NR

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Lookup on F0092 table to get ULAN8 column based on ULUSER.
INSTANCE.NAME: lkp_F0092_R

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Lookup on F01151 table to get EAETP and EAEMAL column based on EAAN8
INSTANCE.NAME: lkp_F01151_R

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Based on the GLPOST column value data is loaded into flatfile and staging table
INSTANCE.NAME: rtr_GLPOST_NR

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Based on the GLPOST column value data is loaded into flatfile and staging table
INSTANCE.NAME: rtr_GLPOST_R

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Sort the records based on the below columns GLKCO,GLDCT,GLDOC,GLJELN and GLLT
INSTANCE.NAME: srt_R

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: JDE table which loads data to Blackline flat file.
INSTANCE.NAME: F0901_NR

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: JDE table which loads data to Blackline flat file.
INSTANCE.NAME: F0901_R

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: JDE table which loads data to Blackline flat file.
INSTANCE.NAME: F0911_NR

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: JDE table which loads data to Blackline flat file.
INSTANCE.NAME: F0911_R

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: JDE table which loads data to Blackline flat file.
INSTANCE.NAME: F0011_NR

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: JDE table which loads data to Blackline flat file.
INSTANCE.NAME: F0011_R

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Lookup on staging table based on F0911_GLDCT, F0911_GLDOC, F0911_GLKCO, F0911_GLJELN, F0911_GLLT column.
INSTANCE.NAME: lkp_S_ZJ_JOURNALS_R

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Define the Flag as 'N' if the data present at Staging table S_ZJ_JOURNALS
INSTANCE.NAME: exp_Flag_STG_R

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Filter the records if it present in Staging table S_ZJ_JOURNALS
INSTANCE.NAME: flt_STG_R

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Lookup on staging table based on F0911_GLDCT, F0911_GLDOC, F0911_GLKCO, F0911_GLJELN, F0911_GLLT column.
INSTANCE.NAME: lkp_S_ZJ_JOURNALS_NR

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Define the Flag as 'N' if the data present at Staging table S_ZJ_JOURNALS
INSTANCE.NAME: exp_Flag_STG_NR

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Filter the records if it present in Staging table S_ZJ_JOURNALS
INSTANCE.NAME: flt_STG_NR

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Expression for trim logic for Fields.
INSTANCE.NAME: exp_TRIM_R

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Filter condition for the data equal to R.
INSTANCE.NAME: flt_condition_R

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Filter condition for the data not equal to R.
INSTANCE.NAME: flt_condition_NR

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Expression for trim logic for fields..
INSTANCE.NAME: exp_TRIM_NR

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Perform aggegation based on GLDGJ column to pick only reversed records having min GLDGJ
INSTANCE.NAME: agg_GLDGJ_R

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Checking for the null values for fields and replacing double quotes.
INSTANCE.NAME: exp_replace_NR

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Expression for data flow.
INSTANCE.NAME: exp_PASS_THROUGH_NR

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: SQ performing join of F0011_F0911_F0901, filtering records based on condition.
INSTANCE.NAME: sq_to_F0011_F0911_F0901_NR

INSTANCE.NAME: exp_PASS_THROUGH_R

SHORTCUT.COMMENTS: This flat file is used for Blackline Journal.
SHORTCUT.NAME: Shortcut_to_FF_BL_ZJ_JOURNALS

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Maximum Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Maximum Percentage of Total Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Additional Concurrent Pipelines for Lookup Cache Creation
Save session log for these runs
Session Log File Max Time Period

TASK.DESCRIPTION: Command to end ETL load process. FOR USE AS POST-SESSION FAILURE COMMAND
TASK.NAME: cmd_etl_end_fail

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails

TASK.DESCRIPTION: Command to initiate ETL load process. FOR USE AS A PRE-SESSION COMMAND.
TASK.NAME: cmd_etl_start

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails

TASK.DESCRIPTION: Command to end ETL load process. FOR USE AS POST-SESSION SUCCESS COMMAND
TASK.NAME: cmd_etl_end

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails

WORKFLOW.DESCRIPTION: This workflow is used to generate blackline journals report
WORKFLOW.NAME: wf_BL_FF_ZJ_JOURNALS_STG

SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This session is used to either generate Blackline Journals Report or loading to S_ZJ_JOURNALS table based on GLPOST
SESSION.NAME: s_m_BL_FF_ZJ_JOURNALS_STG

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

TASKINSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: This session is used to either generate Blackline Journals Report or loading to S_ZJ_JOURNALS table based on GLPOST
TASKINSTANCE.NAME: s_m_BL_FF_ZJ_JOURNALS_STG

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_m_BL_FF_ZJ_JOURNALS_STG.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_m_BL_FF_ZJ_JOURNALS_STG.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_m_BL_FF_ZJ_JOURNALS_STG.ErrorMsg

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Workflow Log File
Save workflow log for these runs
Allow concurrent run with unique run instance name
Allow concurrent run with same run instance name
Maximum number of concurrent runs per Hub

FOLDER.NAME: zj_shared
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: JDE Shared Folder Primary: Vikram Chauhan Secondary: Veretta Schnackenberg
